reasons: Rafaela can repeatedly check nearby areas and reveal Natalia before the assassination fully starts.
Her slow and support positioning help the intended target reposition before Natalia finishes the silence burst.

proof.summary: Natalia depends on hidden approach paths, while Rafaela can reveal and slow nearby threats before they complete the assassination.
worksBestWhen: Rafaela stays near the damage dealer Natalia wants to attack.
failureCases: Natalia waits until Rafaela's reveal skill is used.
Rafaela is isolated and cannot protect the real target.

reasons: Yi-Sun-Shin can reveal enemy positions globally, reducing Natalia's ability to hide rotations before objectives.
His reveal is valuable because Natalia's main threat is surprise entry from camouflage and bush control.

proof.summary: Natalia wants unseen map movement and flank timing, while Yi-Sun-Shin can expose enemy positions globally before major fights or objective contests.
worksBestWhen: Yi-Sun-Shin uses global reveal before Turtle, Lord, or a high-risk rotation.
The team is ready to reposition or collapse when Natalia is revealed.
failureCases: Yi-Sun-Shin's ultimate is on cooldown when Natalia commits.
Natalia waits out the reveal and attacks after the team relaxes.

reasons: Zetian's global reveal can expose Natalia during teamfight setup, reducing the surprise value of her flank.
Her teamfight ultimate is especially useful when Natalia wants to enter during a chaotic fight.

proof.summary: Natalia wants to hide until the backline is vulnerable, while Zetian can reveal enemy heroes during a major teamfight window and make the flank easier to track.
worksBestWhen: Zetian uses ultimate before Natalia enters the backline.
The team communicates Natalia's revealed position and protects the target.
failureCases: Zetian's ultimate is unavailable during Natalia's pickoff attempt.
Natalia attacks outside the teamfight window or after the reveal ends.

reasons: Aldous can reveal all enemy heroes, making Natalia's hidden rotations easier to call out.
Once Natalia is exposed, her flank timing becomes easier to punish or avoid.

proof.summary: Natalia wants unseen map movement, while Aldous can reveal enemy positions and remove the surprise factor before she reaches a fragile target.
worksBestWhen: Aldous uses reveal before major objectives or suspected ambushes.
The team is ready to collapse or retreat when Natalia is revealed.
failureCases: Aldous wastes ultimate when Natalia is not threatening a pickoff.
Aldous commits onto the wrong target and leaves his team exposed.

reasons: Hylos can bodyguard fragile allies and occupy bush entrances, making Natalia's clean backline entry harder.
His persistent nearby pressure and slows punish Natalia if she commits into the protected area.

proof.summary: Natalia wants a clean backline entry, while Hylos can occupy the approach area and punish her if she commits into the protected team zone.
worksBestWhen: Hylos patrols bushes and objective entrances.
Hylos stays close to the target Natalia wants.
failureCases: Natalia avoids Hylos and attacks the opposite side.
Hylos is too far forward to protect the backline.
